leadText: A Maranga Berry (Japanese: タラプのみ Tarapu Fruit) is a type of Berry introduced in Generation VI.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] A Maranga Berry raises the holder's Special Defense by one stage when hit by a special move . This consumes the Maranga Berry. If the holder has Ripen , then its Special Defense rises by two stages. Ingredient [ edit | edit source ] Juice Shoppe X Y Maranga Berries are blue Berries in Group 3. If blended with a Kee Berry , it will become Perilous Soup, resetting the drinker's EVs to 0. Composting X Y Maranga Berries are blue Berries. Berry Blending OR AS Maranga Berries are yellow Berries that have a medium-high chance of producing a Pokéblock +. Dye Houses S M US UM 15 Maranga Berries, Kelpsy Berries , and Oran Berries are used to dye any white or dyed clothing into pastel blue. Curry Sw Sh Maranga Berries have a rarity of 10. Cram-o-matic Sw Sh Maranga Berries are Dark-type items and give 6 points towards the output value.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods X Y Mutation of Salac and Petaya Berries OR AS Super-Secret Base (Gather Berries skill) PMC * Poké Doll Grabber (Lv. 3) S M US UM Berry piles ( Poni Plains ) Sw Sh Berry trees ( Axew's Eye ) Sw Sh IA Berry trees ( Challenge Beach ) Sw Sh CT Berry trees ( Giant's Foot ) S V TM Ogre Oustin'

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA If held by a Pokémon, this Berry will increase the holder's Sp. Def if it's hit with a special move. S V If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a special move, the holder’s Sp. Def stat will be boosted. Curry information [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh A slightly rare Berry. Its outside is very bitter, but its inside tastes like a sweet drink.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods X Y Mutation of Salac and Petaya Berries OR AS Super-Secret Base (Gather Berries skill) PMC * Poké Doll Grabber (Lv. 3) S M US UM Berry piles ( Poni Plains ) Sw Sh Berry trees ( Axew's Eye ) Sw Sh IA Berry trees ( Challenge Beach ) Sw Sh CT Berry trees ( Giant's Foot ) S V TM Ogre Oustin' Growth [ edit | edit source ] Generation VI Pokémon X and Y Planted 0 hours Sprouted 16 hours Growing 32 hours Bigger 48 hours Budding 64 hours Bloom 80 hours Berries 96 hours A Maranga plant will yield 1-10 Berries. During its growth, watering the plant adds 0.2 Berries to the final harvest, weeding it adds 0.1, and removing a pest adds 1. Maranga plants attract Volbeat as pests. Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Planted 0 hours Sprouted 12 hours Taller 24 hours Flowering 36 hours Berries 48 hours A Maranga plant will yield 2-13 Berries. Generation VII Pokémon Sun, Moon, Ultra Sun, and Ultra Moon Planted 0 hours Sprouted 54 hours Taller 60 hours Flowering 68 hours Berries 72 hours A Maranga plant will yield 2 Berries if Isle Aplenny is at Phase 1, 5 Berries if it is at Phase 2, and 8 Berries if it is at Phase 3.
